[Home](./index.md) &gt; [@empathyco/x-components](./x-components.md) &gt; [Recommendations](./x-components.recommendations.md)

## Recommendations class

It renders a list of recommendations from the [Recommendations](./x-components.recommendationsstate.recommendations.md) state by default. The component provides the slot layout which wraps the whole component with the recommendations bounded. It also provides the default slot to customize the item, which is within the layout slot, with the recommendation bounded. Each recommendation should be represented by a [result link component](./x-components.baseresultlink.md) besides any other component.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
export default class Recommendations extends Vue 
```
<b>Extends:</b> Vue

## Properties

|  Property | Modifiers | Type | Description |
|  --- | --- | --- | --- |
|  [animation](./x-components.recommendations.animation.md) |  | Vue | Animation component that will be used to animate the recommendations. |
|  [maxItemsToRender?](./x-components.recommendations.maxitemstorender.md) |  | number | <i>(Optional)</i> Number of recommendations to be rendered. |
|  [resultClickExtraEvents](./x-components.recommendations.resultclickextraevents.md) |  | [PropsWithType](./x-components.propswithtype.md)<!-- -->&lt;[XEventsTypes](./x-components.xeventstypes.md)<!-- -->, Result&gt;\[\] | The additional events to be emitted by the mandatory [BaseResultLink](./x-components.baseresultlink.md) component. |
